ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator (e.g., AIRTEL, JIO) */,
  "operator_description" TEXT /* Description of the operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operator record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., 4G, 5G) */,
  "technology_description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the technology (in MHz) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technology record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technology record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., download, upload) */,
  "test_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network quality measurement */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the network quality measurement (e.g., Perfect, Good, Poor) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the network quality measurement */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the network quality measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network quality record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network quality record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_areas" (
  "service_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service area */,
  "service_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the service area (e.g., UP East, UP West) */,
  "service_area_description" TEXT /* Description of the service area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the service area (e.g., city, state) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service area record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service area record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network performance measurement */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology used */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the network (in kb/s) */,
  "signal_strength" INTEGER /* Signal strength of the network (in dBm) */,
  "service_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service area */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network quality measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("technology_id") REFERENCES technologies ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_service_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_area_id") REFERENCES service_areas ("service_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES network_quality ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical measurement */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network performance measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES network_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
